description: Make pi-context a globally installable command: add a chmod +x dist/bin.js step to the pi-context-cli build so npm link and npm i -g expose an executable pi-context on PATH.
acceptance_criteria: [subagent] The pi-context-cli build sets the exec bit on the bin entry (chmod +x dist/bin.js after tsc); dist/bin.js is -rwxr-xr-x after a clean build.
[orchestrator] npm link from packages/pi-context-cli places an executable pi-context on PATH.
[orchestrator] pi-context <op> --json runs from a cwd outside the repo, resolving @davidorex/pi-context through the linked dependency tree.
[orchestrator] build + check + full test suite pass at zero failures.
[orchestrator] published-package global install (npm i -g @davidorex/pi-context-cli) smoke-tested from a clean machine/dir — deferred, release-gated.
